plant.description: Deep purple fruit used in coastal Indian cooking.

method_1.method: Juice or as a butter for topical use.

medicinal_uses: Classic treatment for digestive acidity and flatulence.
Used for weight loss and preventing fat accumulation.
Kokum butter is excellent for cracked skin and heels.

safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.
